article_meta.title: Facebook X Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and CNN’s Clarissa Ward on the state of the war | The Conversation 02

reasoning: Multiple attribution violations (flagging quoted attacks and a quoted dismissive line), widespread use of invalid bias-type labels, several clear author-prose biases missed, and formatting wrapped in code fences. A few genuine author-level biases were noted but mislabeled.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged quoted language as author bias: "No one's taking Texas seriously" and the NRSC attack on Talarico; also flagged a paraphrased, clearly attributed claim ("Democrats said...").
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Some flagged items are questionable or not author bias (headline framing is debatable; attributed/paraphrased claims treated as author bias).
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear author-prose bias such as "staggering price tag," "poured cold water" (identified but mis-typed), "scoff," "tall ask," "struggling mightily," "battling it out," and labeling Cornyn as a "moderate incumbent."
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-allowed labels (Framing Bias, Selection Bias, Labeling Bias, Source Bias) and misapplied types where valid ones (Word Choice, Subjective Qualifying Adjectives, Slant, Bias by Story Choice and Placement) were appropriate.
